name: MAST P60 Premium permanent makeup machine – Gold
shortDescription: Wireless permanent makeup machine with 5-level adjustable stroke length, coreless motor, and 3+ hours operating time. Ideal for eyebrow, lip, and eyelid pigmentation.
description:
The MAST P60 is a wireless permanent makeup machine designed by Dragonhawk specifically for the permanent makeup field.

Thanks to its built-in battery, it provides complete freedom of movement, while the ergonomic design and mere 121-gram weight reduce hand fatigue during longer work sessions.

One of its special features is the 5-level adjustable stroke length (2.2–3.2 mm), which is rare among permanent makeup machines. This enables techniques ranging from fine hair-stroke eyebrows to shaded effects, as well as adaptation to different skin types.

The quiet coreless motor minimizes noise and vibration, providing a more comfortable experience for both the artist and the client.
metaTitle: MAST P60 permanent makeup machine – wireless, adjustable stroke length
metaDescription: Wireless MAST P60 machine with adjustable stroke length, long battery life, and quiet operation. Perfect for permanent makeup for beginners and pros.

featureRows.headline: Why is the MAST P60 the favorite of permanent makeup artists?
featureRows.subtitle: Precision, freedom, and versatility in a single machine

features.title: 5-level adjustable stroke length
features.description: The MAST P60 is one of the few permanent makeup machines that offers 5 different stroke lengths: 2.2 mm, 2.5 mm, 2.7 mm, 2.9 mm, and 3.2 mm. This enables applying different techniques with a single machine – from fine hair-stroke eyebrows to shaded effects, from sensitive eyelids to fuller lip pigmentation.

features.title: Wireless freedom with 3+ hours operating time
features.description: The built-in 900 mAh battery provides over 3 hours of continuous use on a single charge. Thanks to the Type-C charging connector, it charges quickly and conveniently. No cables, no restrictions – complete freedom of movement during work.

features.title: Quiet, vibration-free coreless motor
features.description: The 11,000 RPM coreless motor operates with minimal noise and vibration. This means more comfortable work for the artist and an improved experience for the client – especially on sensitive areas like the eyelid or lip.

features.title: Ultra-light, ergonomic design
features.description: At only 121 grams and with a 27 mm diameter, 150 mm long design, the MAST P60 is one of the lightest machines on the market. The ergonomic grip reduces hand fatigue, enabling precise work even during multi-hour treatment sessions.

training.headline: Permanent makeup device operator training
training.intro: Professional permanent makeup device operator training is available for the MAST P60, provided within an officially registered adult education program. The training aims to provide participants with comprehensive theoretical and practical knowledge for the professional use of the device.
items: MAST P60 operating principles, stroke length adjustment, and motor characteristics
Eyebrow permanent makeup: hair-strokes, shading, ombré technique
Lip pigmentation: contour, aquarelle, full fill
Eyeliner techniques: thin and thicker line work
Skin types and appropriate stroke length selection
Hygiene protocols and sterile work practices
closingParagraphs: You are welcome to bring a model to the training so you can learn treatment techniques in a real-world setting.
Upon completion of the training, we issue an official certificate confirming competence for the professional operation of the MAST P60 device.
If you are interested in the training opportunity, please contact us through any of our channels to schedule an appointment!

testimonials.name: Sz. Nikolett
testimonials.text: I really love the P60 because <mark>thanks to the adjustable stroke length, I can do everything with a single machine</mark> – eyebrows, lips, eyeliner. The weight is also perfect, my hand doesn't get tired all day. The course was very useful too, I got many practical tips.

expertQuote.quote: The MAST P60 is one of the best value permanent makeup machines on the market. The adjustable stroke length is a rare feature in this category and provides a significant advantage in everyday work.
expertQuote.author: Horváth László

faq.question: What techniques is the MAST P60 suitable for?
faq.answer: Thanks to the 5-level adjustable stroke length, the MAST P60 is suitable for virtually every permanent makeup technique: hair-stroke eyebrows (microblading effect with machine), shaded/ombré eyebrows, lip pigmentation (contour, aquarelle, full fill), eyeliner. The shorter stroke length (2.2 mm) is ideal for sensitive areas, the longer (3.2 mm) for more intensive pigmentation.

faq.question: How long does the battery last on a single charge?
faq.answer: The 900 mAh built-in battery provides over 3 hours of continuous work. This is generally sufficient for 2-3 complete permanent makeup treatments. Thanks to the Type-C connector, it charges quickly.

faq.question: What needle cartridges is the MAST P60 compatible with?
faq.answer: The MAST P60 uses a universal cartridge system. It works excellently with MAST Oceanheart and WJX needle cartridges, which are also available in our webshop. The most commonly used sizes: 1RL and 3RL for eyebrows, 3RL and 5RL for lips.

faq.question: Is the MAST P60 worth choosing as a beginner?
faq.answer: Yes! The MAST P60 was specifically designed to be ideal for both beginners and experienced artists. The adjustable stroke length helps with gradually mastering techniques, and the light weight reduces hand fatigue during the learning period as well.

faq.question: Is there a difference between the Gold, Rosegold, and Purple versions?
faq.answer: There is no technical difference – all three versions have identical specifications and performance. The difference is solely in the color/design, so you can choose according to your personal taste.

faq.question: What training is available for the machine?
faq.answer: A one-day intensive permanent makeup device operator course is available for the MAST P60, conducted within officially registered adult education. The training covers eyebrow, lip, and eyeliner techniques, and is free with device purchase.

faq.question: What warranty applies to the machine?
faq.answer: The MAST P60 comes with a 1-year warranty. If the device needs servicing, we provide a replacement device during repairs so your work doesn't stop.
